title: Policy Amendment Request
description: Request minor or major amendments to an individual policy — KYC updates, life insured details, beneficiaries, payments, premium, riders, and more.

questions.q: What is the policy number you want to amend?
A second policy number covered by this same request? (Skip if none.)
questions.help: One form may be used for multiple policies for minor amendments, or major amendments where the Policyowner, Life Insured and Irrevocable Beneficiaries are all the same.

questions.q: A third policy number? (Skip if none.)
What is your surname?
What is your given name?
What is your middle name?
Do you have any other legal name or alias? (Skip if none.)
What is your date of birth?
What is your nationality?
What is your mobile number?
What is your telephone (landline) number? (Skip if none.)
What is your occupation?
questions.help: State exact duties; if a member of AFP/PNP, state rank.

questions.q: What is the name of your employer or business?
Do you currently file a tax return in the United States of America?
Are there changes in your personal details as Policyowner in the records of Pru Life UK?
questions.help: If yes, you will be asked to fill out the additional KYC details section.

sections.title: Payment & Billing Amendments
sections.intro: These are optional amendments — skip any that do not apply to your request.

questions.q: Do you want to change your method of payment? If so, to which?
Do you opt to resume your credit card/ADA billing and allow Pru Life UK to collect all unpaid premiums from your most recent enrolled/existing card?
questions.label: Yes, resume my credit card/ADA billing

map.check: I opt to resume my credit cardADA billing and allow Pru Life UK to collect all unpaid premiums from my most recent enrolledexisting card

questions.q: Do you opt to stop your credit card/ADA billing?
questions.help: Request must be received by Pru Life UK at least five (5) working days before the premium due date. All unpaid premiums shall be collected upon resumption of the billing.
questions.label: Yes, stop my credit card/ADA billing

map.check: I opt to stop my credit cardADA billing and agree to the following conditions

questions.q: Do you want to change your mode of payment? If so, to which?
Do you opt to avail of the Premium Holiday?
questions.help: Premium payments may be discontinued as long as the fund value is sufficient to cover applicable charges. Corresponding charges apply for Elite plans.
questions.label: Yes, avail of the Premium Holiday

map.check: I opt to avail of the Premium Holiday Premium payments may be discontinued at any time as long as the fund value is sufficient to cover the applicable charges on the Policyies

questions.q: Non-forfeiture option (traditional plans only) — choose one if applicable.

sections.title: Statement of Insurability
sections.intro: To be completed and signed by the Life Insured for any increase in insurance coverage, inclusion of riders, or any request involving additional risks.

questions.q: Does your request involve an increase in insurance coverage, inclusion of riders, or any request involving additional risks?
questions.help: If yes, the Statement of Insurability must be completed and signed by the Life Insured.

questions.q: Should the Policyowner portion also be completed? (Only if the Policy/ies has an existing payor waiver/payor term rider.)
Life Insured — Are you in good health, free from all diseases, deformities and abnormalities?
Policyowner — Are you in good health, free from all diseases, deformities and abnormalities?
Please give the details for that "No" answer.
Life Insured — Since the issuance of the Policy/ies or the last reinstatement — ever had any illness or recurrent illness, injury, medication, or disease?
Policyowner — Since the issuance of the Policy/ies or the last reinstatement — ever had any illness or recurrent illness, injury, medication, or disease?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.

Life Insured — Ever had any medical consultation, hospitalization, or surgical operation due to any condition, or been prescribed for or attended by a physician or practitioner for any cause, or undergone any diagnostic test/s?

Policyowner — Ever had any medical consultation, hospitalization, or surgical operation due to any condition, or been prescribed for or attended by a physician or practitioner for any cause, or undergone any diagnostic test/s?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — Ever been confined or hospitalized in a clinic, institution, or other medical facility?
Policyowner — Ever been confined or hospitalized in a clinic, institution, or other medical facility?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — Ever changed your customary occupation, or country of residence?
Policyowner — Ever changed your customary occupation, or country of residence?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — Ever had any application for life, accident or health insurance, or reinstatement that was declined, postponed, rated, or modified?
Policyowner — Ever had any application for life, accident or health insurance, or reinstatement that was declined, postponed, rated, or modified?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — Experienced death among the immediate members of your family?
Policyowner — Experienced death among the immediate members of your family?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — For female clients: are you now pregnant? If yes, note how many months in the details.
Policyowner — For female clients: are you now pregnant? If yes, note how many months in the details.
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
